title: Monetdb Bugs in Subselect statements:
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE testTable3 (X int, Y varchar(255), Z double NULL);
INSERT INTO testTable3 (X, Y, Z) VALUES (1, 'Alpha', 1.1);
INSERT INTO testTable3 (X, Y, Z) VALUES (2, NULL, 2.2);
INSERT INTO testTable3 (X, Y, Z) VALUES (3, 'Gamma', NULL);
SELECT X, Y, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM testTable3 AS inner_table WHERE inner_table.Y IS NULL AND inner_table.X = outer_table.X) FROM testTable3 AS outer_table;
key_bug_features: Subselect statements with null values in outer query
